reasoning: I will provide a concise summary of the provided news passage without revealing step-by-step reasoning.
output: Monsoon floods have affected millions across at least 20 Indian states, with Assam reporting dozens of deaths and hundreds of thousands displaced. Officials say 450,000 people in one state have been affected. The government has announced aid packages, and Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Assam to seek a permanent solution to the recurring floods. Meanwhile, many affected people in Gujarat have begun returning to their villages.
